prompt: This backend hands out compact signed credentials to authenticated callers and later checks them on incoming requests. Where does it mint one of these signed credentials with a payload and an expiry, and where does it crack a credential open to read its claims without yet trusting the signature?

rubric.answer_shape: one function that creates a signed token, one that decodes claims unverified

evidence.claim: mints a signed credential with payload and expiry
reads claims without verifying the signature

adjudication.notes: Two independent passes selected the same anchors; no disagreement to resolve.
